testcase.name: test_accounts_endpoint_performance
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounts_performance.py:36: in test_accounts_endpoint_performance assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
